projects.name: Healthcare Prior Auth
projects.description: Automate prior authorization workflows — extract patient data from EHR systems, check insurer requirements, flag denial risks, and generate complete submission packages. Built as a 4-agent multi-agent system using LangGraph.
agents_list: Auth Intake Agent — Extracts patient data from EHR/HL7 FHIR feeds
Requirement Checker — Validates insurer-specific criteria and coverage rules
Denial Risk Scorer — Flags high-risk submissions before they get rejected
Documentation Generator — Assembles complete prior auth submission packages

projects.name: Real Estate Lead Gen
projects.description: AI-powered lead generation team — scouts markets, qualifies leads from expired listings and pre-foreclosures, scores prospects using smart criteria, and generates personalized outreach campaigns. Multi-agent system built with LangGraph.
agents_list: Prospecting Agent — Scans expired listings, pre-foreclosures, and off-market signals
Lead Qualifier — Filters and scores leads based on customizable criteria
Outreach Drafter — Generates personalized email/call scripts per lead
Pipeline Tracker — Tracks lead status and follow-up schedules

projects.name: E-Commerce Product Optimizer
projects.description: Automate product listing optimization for e-commerce stores with AI-powered SEO, competitive pricing, review management, and conversion optimization. 4-agent multi-agent system that handles the full product lifecycle.
agents_list: Product Analyzer — Evaluates listing quality and competitor positioning
Content Optimizer — Rewrites titles, descriptions, and keywords for SEO
Pricing Agent — Monitors competitor pricing and recommends optimal prices
Review Manager — Tracks reviews, flags negatives, suggests responses

projects.name: Legal Contract Review
projects.description: Parse contracts, identify redlines and risky clauses, assess risk exposure, generate negotiation summaries, and ensure GDPR/SOC2 compliance. Multi-agent system for legal teams.
agents_list: Contract Parser — Extracts clauses, terms, and obligations from contracts
Risk Assessor — Flags unusual or risky clauses with severity scoring
Compliance Checker — Validates against GDPR, SOC2, and industry standards
Summary Generator — Creates negotiation briefs and redline summaries

projects.name: HR Operations
projects.description: Resume screening, candidate scoring, personalized outreach, onboarding package generation, and compliance tracking. Multi-agent system for HR teams and recruiters.
agents_list: Resume Screener — Parses resumes, extracts skills, ranks candidates
Candidate Scorer — Evaluates fit using customizable scoring criteria
Outreach Agent — Generates personalized outreach messages per candidate
Onboarding Agent — Creates onboarding packages and compliance checklists

projects.name: AI Agent Sandbox & Governance
projects.description: Open-source governance layer for AI agents — defines permission boundaries, sandboxes execution, and audits every tool call. YAML-defined policies, REST API, tamper-proof audit logs.
agents_list: Policy Engine — Enforce YAML-defined permission policies (filesystem, network, commands)
Sandbox Runner — Execute agent actions within defined boundaries
Audit Logger — Tamper-proof audit trail with hash chain verification
API Server — REST API for CI/CD pipeline integration

projects.name: Estonia e-Residency Compliance
projects.description: Automate compliance workflows for Estonia e-Residency applications — document parsing, risk checks, status tracking. Multi-agent system for legal teams.
agents_list: Document Parser — Extract data from e-Residency application documents
Risk Checker — Flag compliance risks and missing requirements
Status Tracker — Monitor application status and deadlines
Report Generator — Create compliance reports and summaries

projects.name: AI App Store Screenshot Generator
projects.description: Automatically generate 800+ localized App Store and Google Play screenshots from a single design template. AI-powered localization across 39+ languages, 3 device sizes, and custom brand kits. Export directly to App Store Connect and Play Console.
agents_list: Design Agent — Generates template layouts and brand-consistent designs
Localization Agent — AI-powered translation across 39+ languages with context awareness
Export Agent — Renders screenshots at all device sizes and uploads to stores
QA Agent — Validates screenshots against platform guidelines and brand consistency

projects.name: AI Team That Finds Leads & Writes Outreach
projects.description: Multi-agent system that finds leads, identifies decision makers, and writes personalized outreach while you sleep. Autonomous lead gen team.
agents: Lead Scout — finds prospects matching ICP
Decision Maker Finder — identifies key contacts
Follow-up Manager — schedules and tracks replies
key_features: Autonomous lead discovery from multiple sources
Decision maker identification with role mapping

projects.name: AI Invoice Reconciliation Agent
projects.description: Autonomous multi-agent system that matches invoices to purchase orders, flags discrepancies, and routes exceptions for approval. Eliminates manual AP workflows.
agents_list: Document Parser — Extracts line items from invoices (PDF, email, EDI)
PO Matcher — Matches invoices to purchase orders and receipts
Discrepancy Detector — Flags price mismatches, missing items, duplicates
Approval Router — Routes exceptions to correct approver based on rules

projects.name: MCP Server for Google Ads, Meta Ads & GA4
projects.description: Production-ready MCP server that connects Claude, Cursor, and Codex to your Google Ads, Meta Ads, and GA4 accounts. Query campaigns, pull performance data, get AI-powered insights.
agents_list: Campaign Reader — Pulls campaign data from Google Ads & Meta APIs
Performance Analyzer — Identifies underperforming campaigns and budget waste
Insight Generator — AI-powered recommendations for optimization
Report Builder — Generates weekly performance reports automatically
